title: Rerun Suco champion timeline after evaluation backfill
description: Run the ScoreChampionVersionTimeline report for suco_home_improvement over the last 21 days with --fresh after the evaluation backfill, then inspect the persisted attachment to verify metric-bearing points for the 2026-05-03T12:49-12:50Z champion-change cluster.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fresh Suco champion timeline report completed after backfill. Report 880849bd-f5c6-4ee5-8f44-913516ce55ae, block 28155aa5-67d9-4b70-a365-25a02865680c. Summary: 29 scores with changes, 58 champion changes, 61 procedures, 177 evaluations, 15335 score results, total optimization cost 136.04663335. Validation: 2026-05-03T12:49-12:50Z cluster still has 7 transitions; only Early Transfer AI has feedback/regression metrics. Missing metric-bearing points: Reason Call - Roofing AI, Zillow AI, Reason Call - Windows AI, Branding Hand-Off AI, Invalid Transfer - AI, Customer Questions AI.
